name: R-5 react-component-build: skills/react-component-build/_install.sh exits with recognized status
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/react-component-build/_install.sh" --help 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -le 2 ] && echo runs 1>&2 || (bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/react-component-build/_install.sh" --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -le 2 ] && echo runs 1>&2)
